```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement SOLID principles in code design"
---
# SOLID Principles
## Task
Apply SOLID principles to code design.
## Requirements
1. Single Responsibility: one reason to change. 2. Open/Closed: extend without modifying.
3. Liskov Substitution: subtypes substitutable. 4. Interface Segregation: small focused interfaces.
5. Dependency Inversion: depend on abstractions.
## Constraints
- Apply pragmatically, not dogmatically. Balance with simplicity. Refactor toward SOLID.
## Success Criteria
- Code follows SOLID. Classes focused. Interfaces small. Dependencies inverted.
```
